channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kenya’s retirees struggle in court to claim owed pensions
item.description: In Kenya, retirement does not always mean financial security. Thousands of former civil servants, teachers, and public sector employees face prolonged legal battles to access pensions owed by the Stat...

item.title: Preliminary U.S. softwood lumber tariffs may drop, but final rate remains uncertain
item.description: The U.S. Department of Commerce has released a preliminary determination suggesting that tariffs on Canadian softwood lumber could decrease to just under 25 per cent, down from the current rate exceed...

item.title: Clint Gutherson supports Dragons’ recruitment of Scott Drinkwater to strengthen team depth
item.description: St George Illawarra Dragons captain Clint Gutherson has shown rare selflessness by backing his club’s bid to sign North Queensland Cowboys fullback Scott Drinkwater, even though it may cost him the No...

item.title: Indian Sikh pilgrims welcomed in Pakistan for Baisakhi celebrations with extensive arrangements
item.description: Over two thousand Sikh pilgrims from India have reached Pakistan to take part in the annual Baisakhi festival, a major religious event that marks both the harvest season and the foundation of the Khal...

item.title: Rivers State University Launches Five-Year Strategic Development Plan
item.description: Rivers State University (RSU) has officially unveiled its comprehensive five-year strategic development plan, emphasizing the need for collective involvement from staff, students, alumni, and stakehol...

item.title: Nagraj Manjule and Vijay Varma discuss the making of 'Matka King' and its portrayal of 1960s Mumbai
item.description: Nagraj Manjule, renowned for his Marathi blockbuster Sairat, has teamed up with Vijay Varma for the upcoming Hindi series 'Matka King', streaming on Prime Video from April 17. The eight-episode series...

item.title: KZN traffic officials use humour to promote road safety and curb drunk driving
item.description: KwaZulu-Natal traffic authorities have introduced a novel approach to tackling drunk driving, combining road safety enforcement with humour on social media. The Road Traffic Inspectorate (RTI) has bee...

item.title: John Lamola steps down as SAA CEO after leading airline’s recovery
item.description: South African Airways (SAA) announced the resignation of its group CEO, Professor John Lamola, effective at the end of April 2026. The airline’s board has appointed Matshela Seshibe, currently CEO of ...

item.title: Parliament urges Epra to act against fuel hoarding at petrol stations
item.description: The National Assembly Committee on Energy has instructed the Energy and Petroleum Regulatory Authority (Epra) to take strict action against petrol stations suspected of hoarding fuel in anticipation o...

item.title: Israeli Airstrike Kills 13 Lebanese State Security Personnel in Nabatiyeh Amid Ceasefire Talks
item.description: An Israeli airstrike on Friday targeted the southern Lebanese city of Nabatiyeh, killing at least 13 State Security personnel, according to a source from the government agency. The strike hit the Stat...

item.title: Concerns raised over Britain's preparedness amid potential international conflict
item.description: The article warns that Britain may not be adequately prepared for potential international conflicts. It highlights rising geopolitical tensions, increased military activity in various regions, and pot...

item.title: Live Updates: Gather Round Weekend Kicks Off in Adelaide
item.description: The Adelaide footy festival, ‘Gather Round,’ is underway, featuring four games across Saturday. Following a couple of damp evenings to start the event, the weather forecast indicates lingering light s...

item.title: US and Iran Prepare for Peace Talks Amid Lingering Issues on Lebanon and Sanctions
item.description: The United States and Iran are set to meet in Islamabad on April 11, 2026, for negotiations aimed at ending their six-week conflict. The Iranian delegation, led by parliamentary speaker Mohammad Baqer...

item.title: Justice Yashwant Varma steps down following inquiry over cash found at his Delhi residence
item.description: Justice Yashwant Varma, who was serving in the Allahabad High Court, has resigned from his post nearly thirteen months after a controversial incident involving the discovery of large sums of burnt cur...

item.title: DA Calls for Weekly Updates on South Africa's Fuel Supply
item.description: The Democratic Alliance (DA) has urged Mineral and Petroleum Resources Minister Gwede Mantashe to provide timely updates on South Africa's fuel situation. It has been fifteen days since his last brief...

item.title: BINI highlights Filipino wit and pride at Coachella performance
item.description: The all-female P-pop group BINI made history this 2026 as they brought the vibrant spirit of Filipino humor and pride to the world stage at Coachella, one of the most prestigious music festivals globa...

item.title: California Investigates Deliberate Introduction of Invasive Nutria Population
item.description: California wildlife officials are investigating the possibility that an invasive rodent species, the nutria, was intentionally introduced to the state. These large rodents, resembling a mix of beaver,...

item.title: BAFTA Issues Public Apology After Racial Slur Aired Live at Film Awards
item.description: The British Academy of Film and Television Arts (BAFTA) has issued an unreserved apology after a racial slur was accidentally broadcast during its annual film awards ceremony. The incident occurred wh...

item.title: Bushbuckridge principal dismissed after investigation confirms sexual relationship with pupil
item.description: A principal from Magwagwaza Secondary School in Bushbuckridge, Mpumalanga, has been dismissed following an internal inquiry that found him guilty of having a sexual relationship with a grade 11 pupil....

item.title: Pakistan hosts US-Iran talks amid Lebanon ceasefire developments
item.description: Islamabad is currently the centre of global attention as Pakistan facilitates high-level talks between Iran and the United States, the first direct engagement since 1979. The dialogue was initially th...
